CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2020 Off Calendar

Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-18-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ENVIROPROTECT, LLC, IN THE PUBLIC INTEREST Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Enviroprotect, LLC's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment" is granted.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
